0b3b2654-8d94-4ac4-bdd6-3e7e90fef234|15d.summary: DMK Group invested €25 million to build a lactoferrin production plant at its German dairy site, expanding its functional ingredients portfolio, with the plant opening in early June 2026. — confirmed by 7 independent outlets.

47e749a1-9c36-4708-b5d1-a992368a9a07|5fc.summary: Arla Foods and Deutsches Milchkontor GmbH complete their merger, forming a single dairy company and appoint Ingo Müller as head of Germany for the combined group effective June 2026. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

19e24ec2-8eac-4ac0-a058-77d52609c11c|7db.summary: Ingredion completes a takeover of Tate & Lyle on 8 June 2026. — confirmed by 3 independent outlets.

45a65f24-4876-4c12-9153-2240a50aa7e9|b50.summary: Molkerei Ammerland, the dairy cooperative located in Ammerland, Germany, reports a mixed 2025 financial balance and confirms it will remain independent while anticipating higher milk prices in 2026. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

a13bcc02-aea8-42d8-b2e7-8fda224037fd|dbc.summary: On May 26, 2026, German mycelium producer InfiniteRoots completed the acquisition of Bosque Foods to expand its industrial mycelium production capacity. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

0c90f64d-220b-4bdb-b471-ec6a9d1f1685|c7e.summary: Orkla Foods acquired a stake in the Asian sauces firm Go Tan Group in June 2026. — confirmed by 3 independent outlets.

08795100-9155-4dcf-a9b4-820f201159ad|77f.summary: On June 3 2026, Nestlé completes the acquisition of Yfood smart food, buying out the Yfood Labs founders. — confirmed by 4 independent outlets.

4bf2784b-fa2e-46a3-81a2-c9baa4e98bbc|74a.summary: In early June 2026, Sticomax Group acquires ICS Spiral Freezers to strengthen its food processing portfolio. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

0b54e8b3-eb20-408c-bf19-63585f0054d0|c8b.summary: Cargill invested €56 million to expand its Belgian production and research & development sites, strengthening European food supply chains. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

1d8af2af-d0e2-4517-a3e9-90240001bc1c|3b2.summary: On 1 June 2026, the dairy conglomerate Lactalis completed its acquisition of the UK‑based protein brand Protein Works. — confirmed by 5 independent outlets.

364cd2d1-ed16-422f-b7b6-5aa5b358aa06|67c.summary: On 27 May 2026, Brussels bakery chain La Fleur du Pain completed the acquisition of a French star baker, adding the French brand to its portfolio. — confirmed by 3 independent outlets.

003035bf-fe83-4455-b27f-3a69b633e322|323.summary: On June 3 2026, Nestlé completes the acquisition of yfood Labs, buying out its founders to obtain full ownership and enable a global expansion. — confirmed by 3 independent outlets.

0381184f-d23c-4482-af84-7ebc51d576ac|30d.summary: Following EU antitrust clearance on May 29 2026, Arla Foods amba merges with DMK, creating a larger European dairy group that immediately expands whey‑protein production capacity across the continent. — confirmed by 4 independent outlets.

4082a5d1-692b-422e-a688-332fcf669f4c|afe.summary: The EU has approved The Protein Brewery’s mycelium‑based protein product Fermotein, the first such mycelium approval, granting the company €18 million for market entry. — confirmed by 3 independent outlets.

d80114da-f80d-4b6f-9388-7531d6855a30|eba.summary: Rafael Oliveira, the chief of JDE Peet’s, is appointed as Heineken’s new CEO. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

019c8fe6-6c7b-49fb-bc0c-e4ffd8a879ac|0bd.summary: LIVEKINDLY Collective has acquired the German plant‑based brand Greenforce in July 2026. — confirmed by 6 independent outlets.

545f42ad-b136-4396-9c6b-57b05c2089c2|81e.summary: Unilever appoints a new senior management team for its German business on 28 May 2026. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

2599eb88-53ce-46e1-b560-4b11242c306b|ce3.summary: Ferrero commits €60 million to expand its production capacity in France, establishing a new manufacturing facility as part of the Choose France 2026 initiative. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

10b94116-7570-4ab8-875e-459b5f7987a9|12d.summary: Döhler acquires Nukoko, a cocoa‑free chocolate alternative startup, on June 18 2026, accelerating its innovation in the confectionery market. — confirmed by 5 independent outlets.

029e9fd2-cb0e-4eec-8ac3-a5536f7f2695|59e.summary: Pacifico Biolabs raised €7 million (about $8 million) in a Series A round on 27 May 2026 to convert idle German breweries into alternative‑protein production facilities and to achieve cost‑parity for its alt‑meat products. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

5ad1f000-fd89-4635-8fc7-f993bbe56fa0|8f4.summary: Arla Foods and DMK Group obtain regulatory approval on May 29 2026 to merge, creating Europe’s largest dairy company. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

10bad992-2a3d-496b-b5ab-95907f1b0ef0|9f2.summary: On 15 June 2026 Vion sells its German food‑service operations to the Group of Butchers. — confirmed by 3 independent outlets.

5e1214ab-26fe-4b74-aa7d-15ec8beb080f|657.summary: Jorian van Acker is appointed as the new head of Mondelez Benelux, with a target of achieving €1 billion in revenue. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

8a9d3011-ba44-4279-a3ba-8fbe9ab8b8e9|c7b.summary: On July 6, 2026, Circular Grain, a Munich‑based startup supported by Amazon, brings to market a nutrient‑rich milk alternative produced from brewer’s spent grain. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

1b3dc974-1a35-4cdc-b28c-89ed17c4d115|aee.summary: Heineken N.V. announces the nomination of Rafael Oliveira as Chief Executive Officer. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

8125378f-33d3-4253-bd2a-d1f92dd673de|9c6.summary: On June 23, 2026, Aryzta completes the acquisition of SEB, a frozen‑products distributor operating in south‑west France, expanding its French distribution network. — confirmed by 4 independent outlets.

2769a8c4-2600-4e93-8b11-baf7c0970219|9a4.summary: Danone acquired Made Group, expanding its presence in the fast‑growing healthy nutrition market in the Asia‑Pacific region. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

366ad1d9-b3c8-4ff7-8d99-27189d887352|489.summary: On 29 June 2026, Austrian beverage group Rauch acquires the German brand Kloster Kitchen in a rescue transaction overseen by lawyer Patrick Meyerle. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

017fa7f6-4ca2-4f84-b3f8-ce79370c712e|d52.summary: On July 2 2026, Dutch brewer Grolsch fully acquires the family‑owned craft brewery Gulpener in the Netherlands. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

4292e10e-dbf6-4469-9b36-9ee87c031172|a92.summary: On July 3, 2026, Palacios Alimentación completes the acquisition of convenience‑food maker Ñaming from Green Arrow Capital and Unigrains Iberia. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

a1634090-bede-4a37-8765-8bc9b2330073|f1d.summary: Schouten Europe acquires the plant‑based Bobeldijk Food Group on 24 June 2026. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

5a4c78b7-de09-4161-be09-49f2c8ec00c8|b13.summary: Rutger Rozendaal, formerly head of De Vegetarische Slager, assumes the role of CEO of The Vegetarian Butcher Collective, the parent company, effective June 24 2026 in the Netherlands. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

8adc948d-db66-4720-bac3-3abd0e0f31b8|b33.summary: In June 2026, Dry4Good secures €5 million to build its industrial pilot plant in Cergy for industrial‑scale production. — confirmed by 2 independent outlets.

5cd3a6cd-38a8-4251-a1a0-b486e26451a4|792.summary: On 25 June 2026 Lactalis files a lawsuit in a French court challenging the EU’s Nutri‑Score front‑of‑pack label and announces it will expand whey production at its German facilities later that month. — confirmed by 3 independent outlets.
